description_long: This lamp features a distinctive industrial design with a stepped, rectangular metal shade suspended from a tall, curved support rod. The rod forms a dramatic spiral loop at its base, which rests on the ground and provides stability. A single exposed bulb hangs beneath the shade, offering direct illumination. The lamp's structure is primarily composed of dark, matte-finished metal, giving it a robust and utilitarian appearance. A visible power cord extends from the base, emphasizing its functional, urban character. The overall form is both sculptural and practical, making it suitable for modern urban environments.
description: A tall, industrial-style floor lamp with a stepped metal shade, spiral support rod, and exposed bulb, finished in dark matte metal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the stepped shade, circular base, and straight alignment of the support rod.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the dramatic spiral curve of the support rod and the exposed bulb beneath the shade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shade, the circular base, and the trailing power cord.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the spiral rod and the lamp's overall sculptural silhouette.
